findings.issue: appBase concatenation with /-prefixed paths produces double-slash (//) URLs when VITE_APP_BASE_URL has a trailing slash, potentially breaking OAuth callback/return_to routing at the server level
findings.remediation: Strip trailing slashes from appBase before concatenation: appBase.replace(/\/+$/, '')

findings.issue: OAuthCallbackPage reads only the 'error' query param but drops 'error_description' from the OAuth 2.0 spec (RFC 6749 Section 4.1.2.1), depriving users of human-readable error context
findings.remediation: Also read searchParams.get('error_description') and include it in the redirect URL or displayed error message
